title: Jinbe and Arlong Choose Their Paths
description: On pages 16–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is jinbe and arlong choose their paths.
scene: The scene follows jinbe and arlong choose their paths, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm very sorry!! I'll work hard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'll clean the ship without resting!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So please don't hit me any more!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm very sorry...!! I'm very sorry.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop that. Please. Are you so afraid of us...?!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Yes....!! but I want to see my mother, so I have to be brave and stay on this ship...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I don't work hard, you might kill me, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I promise I'll be useful, so please don't kill me....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's a slave through and through, this one...

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: She must have grown up seeing her fellow slaves getting killed just for crying, or for not working hard enough...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: learned to close herself off from the world, always frightened that she might be next...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Boss?!! What are you going to...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's rough, but it's the only way. That brand brings back memories of things best left forgotten.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah - I lost conscious- mess....!! I'm sorry!

dialogue.speaker: Koala
dialogue.text: So please don't kill me!! I swear - I won't cry, no matter what -

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And why shouldn't you cry?!!! Listen, kid!! We're not the same...

summary: Jinbe and Arlong Choose Their Paths. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
